intended_payoff: Viewer feels the reset is doable today and saves it for tomorrow's lunch.
core_message: Two minutes beside the desk is enough to reset your body before a meeting.

evidence_strength.rationale: Two adjacent creators outperforming baseline on the same premise.

viral_potential.rationale: Strong hook pattern, but the niche caps ceiling.

audience_nurture_value.rationale: Directly serves desk-worker reset habit building.

creator_fit.rationale: Matches Luna's calm two-minute reset persona exactly.

schedule_fit.rationale: Fits the open midweek education slot.

production_readiness.rationale: Single location, existing style card, no new assets.

urgency.rationale: Trend is rising but not spiking; two-week window.

measurement_clarity.rationale: Saves and completion rate map cleanly to the payoff.
